linting.notes: Ruff is configured via pre-commit hooks only (no standalone ruff.toml). Python version is pinned to 3.12. The no-commit-to-branch hook is skipped in CI via SKIP env var.

testing.notes: NO TESTS EXIST. This is a demo/documentation repository with examples, benchmarks, and deployment guides. No test files, test directories, or test framework configuration found.

gating_checks.name: pre-commit
gating_checks.details: Runs ruff, pre-commit hooks, license insertion, and various file checks. Verifies no uncommitted changes after pre-commit runs.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main branch. Uses Python 3.12, caches pip dependencies. The no-commit-to-branch hook is skipped in CI via SKIP=no-commit-to-branch env var. RUFF_OUTPUT_FORMAT=github for proper PR annotations.

build.notes: This is a demo/docs repository. Individual demos have requirements.txt files and some have Makefiles for deployment (e.g., demos/redbank-demo/Makefile). The Go component uses go.mod (Go 1.24.2). No unified build system for the entire repository. Demos are deployed to Kubernetes/OpenShift rather than being built as packages.

conventions.notes: Python 3.12 is standard. Each demo must include README.md, DEPLOYMENT.md (or deployment section in README), and requirements.txt if needed. License headers are automatically inserted in .py and .sh files via pre-commit hook. Kubernetes manifests use kustomize in stack/ directory.

lint_commands.notes: SUCCESS - All checks passed except no-commit-to-branch (which is expected and skipped in CI)

env_vars: SKIP=no-commit-to-branch (to skip the no-commit-to-branch hook in CI)
container_recipe.notes: Git and make are already included in python:3.12 image. No tests to run. Ruff uses default configuration (no custom ruff.toml or pyproject.toml config in repo root).

results.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git make

results.notes: SUCCESS - All checks passed except no-commit-to-branch which is expected (prevents committing to main). This hook is skipped in CI.
SUCCESS - Ruff linting passed with no issues
SUCCESS - All Python files are properly formatted

validation.summary: install OK, pre-commit OK (all hooks passed), ruff check OK, ruff format OK

gaps: No tests exist - this is a demo/documentation repository
No test framework configured (no pytest, unittest, etc.)
No test files found anywhere in the repository
No unified build system - individual demos have their own requirements.txt
No unified dependency management for the entire repo
Demos require Kubernetes/OpenShift cluster for deployment (cannot be tested in isolation)
Go component (whatsapp-bot) has no linting configured in pre-commit
No ruff.toml configuration file (uses defaults only)
